title: Tongan scholars reawaken ancient musical tradition
description: Reawakening the art and practice of the Tongan bamboo nose flute is part of an exhibition in Porirua.

title: Finally returning home: American family repatriates five ancient artifacts to Greece
description: Mendoni expressed her gratitude to the Gray family for their decision to return the artifacts, noting that it “highlights the decisive role of citizens in the protection of cultural heritage.”

title: Ancient toxin that targets insects may have implications for human health and drug discovery - McMaster News
description: Ancient toxin that targets insects may have implications for human health and drug discovery McMaster News Buried in soil, a 100-million-year-old bacterial toxin could reshape pest control and antibiotic discovery Phys.org

title: Countries discuss how to move away from fossil fuels at international conference
description: Countries have wrapped up a first-of-its-kind summit in Colombia on phasing out fossil fuels with no binding commitments but a growing momentum to shift from pledges to action.
